game.name: Math & Reading Quest
game.description: Short, gamified math puzzles for kids ages 8–12. Earn XP, build streaks, and level up!
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_friends_activity: No friend activity yet. Add friends to see their badges!
dashboard.streak_reminder: You're on a :count day streak! One more day for a badge.
compete.title: Compete
compete.subtitle: Race against a friend! Each player gets problems at their grade level.
compete.share_code: Share this code with a friend:
compete.online_count: :count user(s) online — they'll get a notification when you create a game
compete.question: Q#
play.combo_keep_going: :count in a row — one more for bonus!
play.no_worries: No worries — you'll get it next time!
play.get_hint: 💡 Get a hint for next time
play.hint_error: Oops! Could not get a hint right now. Try again!
play.explain_error: Could not load explanation. Try again!
play.hint_rate_limit: The AI is busy. Try again in a minute.
play.explain_rate_limit: The AI is busy. Try again in a minute.
think.title: Think
think.subtitle: Solve AI-generated word problems. Ask the AI teacher for help anytime!
think.generating_hint: AI is writing a custom word problem for you
think.generate_error: Could not generate problem. Make sure the queue worker is running.
think.ask_teacher_hint: Type or use the mic to ask questions
think.chat_empty: Ask a question about the problem!
think.voice_not_supported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
think.chat_error: Could not get a response. Try again.
think.chat_rate_limit: The AI teacher is busy right now. Please try again in a minute.
auth.name: Name
auth.forgot_password_message: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
auth.verify_email_message: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
auth.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
auth.confirm_password_message: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.github_email_required: Your GitHub account must have a public email to sign in.
auth.facebook_email_required: Your Facebook account must have an email to sign in.
profile.title: Profile
profile.avatar_hint: JPG, PNG, GIF or WebP. Max 2MB.
profile.information_desc: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.update_password_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.delete_account_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.delete_confirm_message: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
profile.delete_confirm_message_oauth: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
family.title: Family
family.subtitle: Add and manage your children's accounts. They can log in with their email and password.
family.no_children: No children added yet. Use the form above to register your first child.
profile_select.title: Who's playing?
profile_select.subtitle: Select a profile to continue
rewards.title: Treasure Chest
rewards.treasure_intro: You've earned points by practicing! Request a reward and your parent will get an email. Pick a tier below:
rewards.message_optional: Add a message for your parent (optional):
rewards.message_placeholder: e.g. Can I get a new book? I've been saving for a LEGO set!
rewards.request_sent: Request sent! Your parent will get an email.
rewards.invalid_tier: Please select a valid reward tier.
rewards.insufficient_points: You don't have enough points for this tier.
rewards.parent_email_intro: :name earned enough points and wants to redeem for a reward!
rewards.parent_email_footer: You can fulfill this reward by getting them an Amazon gift card or another treat. Great job encouraging their learning!
friends.title: Friends
friends.no_friends: No friends yet. Search for users above to send friend requests!
friends.clear_notifications_confirm: Clear all notifications? This cannot be undone.
friends.parent_email_request_received: :child received a friend request from :other. You can review pending requests in the Friends section.
friends.parent_email_footer: You can manage your child's friends from the Family section when logged in.
badges.title: My Badges
badges.subtitle: Unlock badges by playing, building streaks, and reaching milestones!
badge.combo_5_desc: Get 5 correct answers in a row
stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: Your math journey at a glance
badge.combo_3_desc: Get 3 correct answers in a row
badge.report_card_star_desc: Complete all suggested practice from your AI report card
report_card.title: Report Card
report_card.set_country_hint: Set your country in Profile for country comparison
report_card.no_reports_hint: Reports are generated every 2 weeks when you have enough activity. Keep practicing!
report_card.practice_first_hint: Complete the suggested exercises below before playing Compete.
report_card.complete_practice_first: Complete your suggested practice before playing Compete.
report_card.ask_ai_hint: Ask a question about this student's progress. The AI has access to their reports and stats.
report_card.ask_placeholder: e.g. How can I help with division at home?
report_card.ask_error: Could not get a response. Try again.
profile.country_hint: Used for percentile comparison with other users in your country
